name: Missile-Tow Dive-Clops
description: Missile-Tow Dive-Clops is the Christmas counterpart of Dive-Clops in Skylanders: SuperChargers.
biography: Every Skylander celebrates the holiday season in their own special way. For some, it means giving and receiving presents. For others, it means stuffing their face with festive food. For Dive-Clops it means hiding beneath the Academy archways to shoot candy-coated missiles at fellow Skylanders that pass by. To be fair, he does hang a sign that reads: 'Ho-Ho-Ho...Look Out Below!'
personality: Missile-Tow Dive-Clops is festive and mischievous, taking great joy in the holiday season by playing lighthearted pranks on his fellow Skylanders with his candy-coated missiles.

story.content: Every Skylander celebrates the holiday season in their own special way. For some, it means giving and receiving presents. For others, it means stuffing their face with festive food. For Dive-Clops it means hiding beneath the Academy archways to shoot candy-coated missiles at fellow Skylanders that pass by. To be fair, he does hang a sign that reads: 'Ho-Ho-Ho...Look Out Below!'

trivia: The first half of his name, 'Missile-Tow' is a pun of 'mistletoe' and 'missile'.
gameplay: In Skylanders: SuperChargers, Missile-Tow Dive-Clops fights using holiday-themed weaponry, specifically shooting candy-coated missiles at his opponents. He is known to use his environment to hide and ambush enemies with projectiles.

basic.name: Waterpedo
basic.content: Dive-Clops launches a powerful torpedo at enemies.

basic.name: Sonar
basic.content: Dive-Clops uses his eye to emit sonar waves to detect and damage enemies.

basic.name: Put the Eye in Geyser
basic.content: Dive-Clops creates a massive geyser to launch enemies into the air.

basic.name: Torpeslow
basic.content: Dive-Clops releases a slow-moving but high-impact torpedo.

basic.name: Sonar Smarts
basic.content: Dive-Clops uses his intelligence to enhance his sonar capabilities.
